name: JiimSmith Agent Inbox plans and manages next moves
description: Verify that the current Home Agent Inbox can request proposed next moves, reveal rationale, and keep Accept/Ignore actions usable without crashing.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app as the default lead member.
Verify the Home view shows "Agent Inbox — proposed next moves".
Click "Plan next moves ↻" and wait for the request to finish.
Verify the inbox either shows proposed actions with priority meters or a clear no-proposals empty state; a blocked request, blank panel, or console-visible crash is a failure.
If proposed actions appear, click the "why" affordance on the first action.
Verify the rationale expands inline without changing pages.
Verify Accept and Ignore controls are visible for each proposed action and stay disabled only while an action is being processed.
